gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just swept through the garden, updating the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community applications.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh and up-to-date for visitors and new contributors.
gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot and Polly the bee updating a giant wooden sign or a literal book (README) in a cozy garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the bee mascot working together to paint a giant wooden sign in a lush digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the bee mascot working together to paint a giant wooden sign in a lush digital garden.
